Case Study • Various

How we helped VD Gems Limited, Hong Kong Earns RJC COP 2019 Certification with Guidance from Growlity

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

V. D. Gems Limited, one of Hong Kong’s trusted diamond companies, has proudly achieved the Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC) Code of Practices (COP) 2019 Certification. This milestone was reached with expert support and guidance from Growlity Inc., a global consulting firm that helps companies strengthen their ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) and sustainability practices.

This certification highlights V. D. Gems’ strong commitment to doing business with integrity, transparency, and responsibility. It also marks an important step in their journey toward becoming a more sustainable and trusted name in the diamond industry.

V. D. Gems’ Journey Toward Responsible Practices

Sharing his thoughts on this achievement, Mr. Dharmesh Vaghani, Director of V. D. Gems Limited, said:

“We are extremely proud to achieve the RJC COP 2019 Certification. It shows our dedication to responsible and sustainable practices in everything we do. The Growlity team guided us at every step — from setting up systems to meeting the standards. This certification gives more confidence to our customers and partners, showing that we care about people, the planet, and ethical business values.”

With this achievement, V. D. Gems Limited has proven its focus on ethical sourcing, safe workplaces, fair labor practices, and environmental care — all key elements of the RJC Code of Practices.

Growlity’s Role in the Success

Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO of Growlity Inc., shared his appreciation for the collaboration:

“It was a pleasure working with the V. D. Gems team. Their leadership was open to learning and adopting best practices in sustainability and governance. Our role was to help them not just meet the RJC COP 2019 requirements but also build a stronger ESG foundation for their future growth.”

Growlity supported V. D. Gems throughout the process — from assessing gaps and preparing documentation to training teams and improving internal policies — ensuring that the company was fully ready for the RJC audit and certification.

About V. D. Gems Limited

Based in Hong Kong, V. D. Gems Limited is known for sourcing, trading, and supplying high-quality diamonds to global markets. The company is built on trust, transparency, and ethical business values. With the RJC COP 2019 Certification, V. D. Gems has taken another strong step toward becoming a responsible and sustainable diamond company.

About Growlity

Growlity Inc. is a global advisory firm that helps companies build sustainable, responsible, and transparent business systems. The firm specializes in RJC Certification Support, ESG strategy, sustainability reporting, and supply chain due diligence.

Led by Dr. Nitin Dumasia, Growlity has guided many companies in the jewelry, manufacturing, technology and many more sectors to achieve international certifications and long-term sustainability goals.

Connect with Growlity
